title: Accessible Names, Images, Language, Headings, Landmarks, and Human Review
description: The tool counts alt attributes, assumes heading rank alone proves structure, ignores accessible names and language, and labels automated checks WCAG conformance. Learners cumulatively produce accessible page-quality audit with human-review handoff through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Check declared page and part language, document title presence and purpose, and conflicts with observed content while retaining human-review limits.
Extract headings, labels, sections, and landmarks in document context and flag missing or misleading structure without enforcing a simplistic numeric ladder.
Classify informative, decorative, functional, complex, grouped, linked, and text images and assess alternative evidence in context.
